description: Single integration contract for the full QIT runtime stack. Each layer declares its owner files, source corpus entries, live tools, proof guard status, runtime status, and open gaps. Nothing is 'live' unless this ledger says so.
integration_rules: nothing is live just because it exists in the corpus
nothing is proved unless it passes the nonclassical guard layer
nothing is graph-integrated unless dynamic state is written and read back
nothing is math-integrated unless real algebra objects affect the runtime
nothing is system-integrated unless retrieval/context supports the same stack without overwriting canon

source.purpose: Master source universe. Repos, papers, method bundles, imported skill corpora. Not done just because it is saved.

method_family.name: 29 Retooled External Methods
method_family.retool_contract: keep the useful process, identify the flattening assumption, retool to respect finitude and non-commutation

source.missing: unified intake pass over home_local_pools; undercaptured repos not yet given bounded live slices

proof.purpose: Nonclassical constraint enforcement. Anti-classical guardrails. Machine-checkable admissibility rules. Must be built BEFORE broader proof search tools.

encode: no classical retrocausality (bridge MI is forward-only)
z3_role.contract: every proof candidate must pass z3 guard before it is treated as meaningful

nonclassical_constraints_to_encode: RC-1: Hopf fibration as spatial entropy gradient field
RC-2: EC-3 cycle as operator algebra closure condition
chirality is grade-3 pseudoscalar, not scalar
topo_gate is 2-cell legality, not mere graph adjacency
ADMISSIBILITY = sign(d_ga0) == sign(d_ct_mi), not any other co-arising definition
marginal preservation: Tr_B(rho_AB) = rho_A must hold except at declared bridge steps
proof.missing: z3 constraint ledger file; anti-classical guard module; proof candidate test harness

math.purpose: Live noncommutative algebra. Real multivectors and rotors affecting runtime. Not coefficient arrays.

live_status.phase_gamma_from_mv_interaction: partial — abs(mv_interaction) used, not a principled invariant extraction

math.open_gap: GA invariant extraction: e1 * e123 = e23 (grade-2 bivector). The scalar part is 0. What invariant from the geometric product is the right phase scalar? Inner product? Grade projection? Magnitude? Not yet defined.
math.missing: principled invariant extraction from multivector product; rotor-based operator application; kingdon bridge for differentiable GA

graph.purpose: Live dynamic graph tensor state. Every edge carries evolving state written and read back per engine step.
graph.missing: ENTANG_WEIGHT and ADMISSIBILITY slot writes from analyze_trajectory; constraint tensors (step 4); cut-state family over live graph state

runtime.purpose: Engine, Axes 0-6, cut-state construction, negative sim families. The proving lane.

live_status.full_negative_families: partial — 5 modes exist, fixed-marginal and Cartesian-leak not yet wired
live_status.bridge_mi_proxy: bell_injected still used for co-arising rate; strict mode 55-61%

open_proofs.OPEN_1_co_arising: ga0=MI co-arising trajectory-specific; T3 cross-corr peak at lag=0; outer 94.4%, inner 72.9%
open_proofs.i_scalar: ga0*=0.50 derived from GA0_OFFSET balance; formal derivation from RC-1+RC-2 open
open_proofs.cut_state_legality: NOT STARTED — bridge_mi is still a proxy

runtime.missing: legal cut-state families; machine-checked constraints; full negative matrix (fixed-marginal, Cartesian-leak, ordering-shuffle)

context.purpose: Corpus retrieval, graph memory, skills, operator support. Read-only. Non-canonical. Separate from sim truth.
context.missing: graph-RAG retrieval; corpus intake pipeline; skill execution support; operator context assembly
context.build_order_constraint: do not start until cut-state layer is honest (runtime step 5)

build_order: 1. foundation locked (sim_L6_master_engine.py guard, Axes 7-12 deferred) — DONE
2. dynamic PyG edge tensors — IN PROGRESS (5/7 slots live, 2 open)
3. clifford in runtime math path — PARTIAL (multivectors live, invariant extraction open)
4. z3 nonclassical constraint ledger and anti-classical guardrails — NOT STARTED
5. legal cut-state family over live graph — NOT STARTED
7. HyperNetX/XGI only when pairwise edges lose many-to-many structure — DEFERRED
8. LightRAG/graph-RAG retrieval for context — NOT STARTED (blocked on step 5)

immediate_next.rationale: Without this, every proof attempt drifts back to classical defaults. z3 is the only tool that can machine-check the forbidden-assumption boundary.
immediate_next.first_deliverable: qit_nonclassical_guards.py — z3 Solver encoding of core nonclassical constraints from the QIT engine
